terms.description: The Cities and Municipalities Competitiveness Index is a DTI-led ranking that compares local economies across several pillars.
A score for one CMCI dimension, such as economic dynamism, government efficiency, infrastructure, resiliency, or innovation.

content.sourceNote: CMCI figures are based on the latest source file included in this page. Update this JSON data file when DTI publishes a new profile.
